Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Fonkalsrud Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
John Brown for plaintiff and moving party Matt Nawrocki
Jung H. Park for defendant and opposing party William Tessar
HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification to ruling as to interrogatory #30.
Fonkalsrud interrogatories Set #1
16, 17
Denied. The information is irrelevant to the subject matter of plaintiff's claims
Fonkalsrud interrogatories Set #2
24
Granted. Defendant is ordered to respond further with specific facts as to the circumstances of any alleged errors.
26
Denied. The question is overbroad.
27, 28
Denied in light of the ruling as to question #26
Fonkalsrud interrogatories Set #3
30
The interrogatory is re-drafted to: identify every person who participated in sending the message to plaintiff that begins with the words, "Hi, this is William Tessar"
32
Denied. The question is overbroad
Nawrocki request for production #1
19, 20
Granted in part. Defendant is ordered to produce the requested information for the period of January 1, 2001 to the present. Any documents withheld based on a claim of privilege shall be identified with particularity in a privilege log.
21
Denied. The request is overbroad.
All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Mar-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
John Brown for plaintiff and moving party Matt Nawrocki
Jung H. Park for defendant and opposing party William Tessar
HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Nawrocki interrogatories set #1
5
Granted in part. Defendant is ordered to produce the requested information for January 1, 2004 to the present. For persons who are current employees, defendant may provide their work address and telephone number
7
Granted in part. Defendant is ordered to produce the requested information for the period of January 1, 2001 to the present
8
Granted in part. Defendant is ordered to produce the requested information for the period of January 1, 2001 to the present
9
Defendant is ordered to produce the requested information for the period of January 1, 2001 to the present.
12, 13
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to respond. The Court makes no rulings as to the sufficiency of responses that plaintiff anticipates will be made in response to the specified interrogatories
23
